agent_spec.task: Search the knowledge base for documents about 'onboarding incident 14' and provide me the most relevant results with their content.

tools.description: Searches the knowledge base for documents matching the given query. Parameters: query (string, required), top_k (integer, required). Returns a list of document objects with id, title, snippet, and score.
Retrieves a single document by its ID. Parameter: doc_id (string, required). Returns the complete document object with id, title, text, and metadata.
